calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2020 Off Calendar

Application For Prove Up Hearing And Judgment Establishing Title To Real Property Pursuant To Destroyed Land Records Relief Law Code Civ Proc 764 010 And 751 14 And Local Rule 6 6d
Off Calendar Aug-25-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants All Persons Claiming any Interest in, or Lien Upon, the Real Property Herein Described or any Part Thereof.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

StevenJ. Kahn, Esq. and Kristin Bourne, Esq. appeared for plaintiff EQX Jackson SW Holdco, LLC a Delaware limited limited liability company.
Jonathan Shum, Vice President of EQX Jackson SW Holdco, LLC a Delaware limited limited liability company, was placed under oath and testified.
Ben Ron, Surveyor with Martin M. Ron Associates, Inc., was placed under oath and testified.
Mr. Ron appeared via CourtCall for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendants All Persons Claiming any Interest in, or Lien Upon, the Real Property Herein Described or any Part Thereof.
Plaintiff's Complaint to Quiet Title was filed on September 23, 2019.
Notice of Pendencyof Action was filed on September 26, 2019.
Order GRANTING plaintiff's application to serve Summons & Complaint via Posting was filed on February 6, 2020.
Proof of Service of Posting was filed on June 11, 2020.
Default was entered on June 12, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff EQX Jackson SW Holdco, LLC a Delaware limited limited liability company, and against the defaulted defendant All Persons Claiming any Interest in, or Lien Upon, the Real Property Herein Described or any Part Thereof, as follows:

***SEE PAGES TWO, THREE AND FOUR OF JUDGMENT***

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2020 Continued To Oct-07-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2020 Continued To Jul-29-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2020 Continued To Apr-29-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
